jcr:root.jcr:title: Welcome to Flower Power
jcr:root.jcr:description: Where vibrant design blooms into beautiful experiences

hero.title: Bloom with Flower Power
hero.subtitle: A playful celebration of color, motion, and delightful design

intro.headline: Nature Meets Digital
intro.text:
In every petal, there's a story. In every bloom, there's beauty. Flower Power brings the vibrant energy of a spring garden to your digital experience. Our design philosophy celebrates bold colors, organic movement, and the simple joy of watching something beautiful grow.

Built with modern web technologies and a playful spirit, this project showcases what's possible when you combine the precision of code with the spontaneity of nature.

features.headline: Why Flowers?
features.text:
Flowers are nature's way of showing off — they're vibrant, varied, and utterly unapologetic about their beauty. That's exactly the energy we wanted to bring to this application.

  • Vibrant Pink: Bold, confident, impossible to ignore
  • Sunny Yellow: Warm, welcoming, radiating positivity
  • Organic Motion: CSS animations that dance like petals in the breeze
  • OKLCH Colors: Perceptually uniform color space for harmonious palettes

footer.col1Content: A demonstration of vibrant design patterns, built with Apache Sling and modern frontend technologies.
footer.col3Content: Built with 🌸 by the Flower Power team.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Flower Power. A Slingslop demonstration project. All rights reserved.
